file_name: Questionnaire - Opal Healthcare - Bethel Aged Care_0.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition. Are Opal Healthcare and Bethel Aged Care close competitors and what alternatives are available?
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Opal Healthcare and/or Bethel Aged Care.
